meta.title: HexAstral — The Stars Know Who You Are
meta.description: Ancient Eastern wisdom meets AI — discover your cosmic blueprint in 60 seconds. Destiny Chart & Star Palace readings.

landing.heroSub: Ancient Eastern wisdom meets AI — discover your destiny in 60 seconds
landing.heroNote: No signup · 60-second chart · 3 coins on first reading

features.title: Destiny Chart
features.desc: Precision charting of your Four Pillars of Destiny (Ba Zi). Decode your Core Element, Tiangan Dizhi (Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches), and the I Ching (Ba Gua) hexagram.

features.title: Star Palace Reading
features.desc: All 12 star palaces decoded using Zi Wei Dou Shu. Major fate cycles and annual flows mapped with precision.

features.title: Fate Cycles & Celestial Formations
features.desc: 10-year fate cycle mapped against celestial formations — pinpoint the opportunities and risks at each life stage.

features.title: Elemental Compatibility
features.desc: Dual chart synthesis quantifies connection, attraction, and sources of friction between two people.

landing.convBody:
To understand yourself? To see a relationship more clearly? To make sense of a chapter in your life that was unusually hard?
Whatever it is, the stars have answers.

testimonials.text: "You're a wild horse at heart, but reality has kept you in a stable" — I cried reading that.
testimonials.name: C.W.

testimonials.text: The compatibility report helped me finally understand, through the Five Elements lens, why we always fight over the exact same thing.
testimonials.name: L.H.

testimonials.text: The fate cycle timeline made everything click — I finally understood why 2024 was so brutal. I'd just entered a new cycle.
testimonials.name: Kevin W.

landing.ctaSub: Download HexAstral — unlock AI deep reading, fate cycle timelines & celestial formation analysis on your first chart

onboarding.bCityQuestion: Where did you first draw breath? Your birthplace anchors your chart to the earth.
